translations.text: as they sit on couches, gazing around.

text_qpc_hafs: هَلۡ ثُوِّبَ ٱلۡكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُواْ يَفۡعَلُونَ ٣٦
text_uthmani: هَلْ ثُوِّبَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ

translations.text: Have the disbelievers [not] been repaid for their deeds?
When the sky is ripped apart,
obeying its Lord as it rightly must,
when the earth is levelled out,
casts out its contents, and becomes empty,
obeying its Lord as it rightly must,

text_qpc_hafs: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدۡحٗا فَمُلَٰقِيهِ ٦
text_uthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًا فَمُلَـٰقِيهِ

translations.text: you humans, toiling laboriously towards your Lord, will meet Him:
whoever is given his record in his right hand
will have an easy reckoning
and return to his people well pleased,

text_qpc_hafs: وَأَمَّا مَنۡ أُوتِيَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهۡرِهِۦ ١٠
text_uthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهْرِهِۦ

translations.text: but whoever is given his record from behind his back
will cry out for destruction––
he will burn in the blazing Fire.
He used to live among his people well pleased.
He thought he would never return [to his Lord]––

text_qpc_hafs: بَلَىٰٓۚ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرٗا ١٥
text_uthmani: بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرًا

translations.text: indeed he will! His Lord was watching him.
I swear by the glow of sunset,
by the night and what it covers,
by the full moon,
you will progress from stage to stage.
So why do they not believe?

text_qpc_hafs: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانُ لَا يَسۡجُدُونَۤ۩ ٢١
text_uthmani: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ لَا يَسْجُدُونَ ۩

translations.text: Why, when the Quran is read to them, do they not prostrate themselves [to God]?
No! The disbelievers reject the Quran––
God knows best what they keep hidden inside––
so give them news of a painful torment.

text_qpc_hafs: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ لَهُمۡ أَجۡرٌ غَيۡرُ مَمۡنُونِۭ ٢٥
text_uthmani: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۭ

translations.text: But those who believe and do good deeds will have a never-ending reward.
